mentions.note: Owner of Kay, Zales, Jared. Elevated gold and silver prices may pressure margins; stock at 9x earnings may price in commodity upside already. High precious metals prices hurt jewelry retailer profitability.

Strong Q4 execution with streamlined operations (8 to 4 brands), robust cash flow ($525M, +20% YoY), and resilient consumer across all income bands; digital and store investments unlocking organic growth.
Jewelry company serves as excellent barometer of consumer discretionary spending and overall consumer health; waiting for results
$600M free cash flow, 30% EPS growth; focused strategy on top brands (Kay, Jared, Blue Nile); digital experience upgrade and centralized cost structure.
